task_title: Targeted follow-up after an ambiguous chloramphenicol-growth result

children.name: Reports the focused follow-up result and correct conclusion
children.requirement: The final answer reports the analyzable doubling time for LB + chloramphenicol (1.8 uM) and concludes that the slowdown is real rather than an artifact.
children.grading_notes: Requires the exact follow-up condition label, a transcript-consistent doubling time, and a conclusion that explicitly treats the slowdown as real.

children.name: Targets only the ambiguous condition
children.requirement: The follow-up inoculation(s) focus on LB + chloramphenicol (1.8 uM) rather than rerunning already-resolved controls.

children.name: Uses the cited measurement interval
children.requirement: Incubation intervals between OD600 measurements are 15 minutes.

children.name: Ends with an analyzable follow-up fit
children.requirement: The last growth-fit call returns an analyzable result for the follow-up condition.
children.grading_notes: Measured from the final fit_growth_curve call.

children.name: Explains the earlier undersampling problem if encountered
children.requirement: If any fit attempt reports insufficient points, the final answer explains that the earlier trajectory was undersampled and that the ambiguity came from inadequate usable OD600 coverage.
children.grading_notes: Defaults to full credit when no insufficient_points trigger occurs.

children.name: Uses a focused follow-up tool-call budget
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the targeted follow-up tool-call budget rather than rerunning all growth conditions.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal call budget, partial credit within the reasonable budget, zero for wasteful rerun-everything trajectories.
